headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -95.0)
key_insights: Fears trending up 93% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 148 quotes, including 117 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• At 66.3, frustrations are running well above typical levels for this period, though still below the 130-day peak.

• Optimism took a sharp dive from yesterday's neutral territory into negative range, while fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
